DESCRIPTION: Test that clearing the git repo config returns to active.
NAME: test_git_sync_disable

DESCRIPTION:
Test that a user can log in to MediaWiki using SAML authentication.

    arrange: MediaWiki is deployed with SAML configured and a test IdP running.
    act: Register a user in the IdP, initiate SAML login via MediaWiki.
    assert: The user is authenticated and can access their user page.
NAME: test_saml_login

DESCRIPTION: Test that the SMTP relation can be established and charm goes active.
NAME: test_integrate_smtp

DESCRIPTION: Check uploading a file to MediaWiki via the API.
NAME: test_upload

DESCRIPTION: Check that ClamAV is working by uploading a test file containing the EICAR test signature.
NAME: test_clamav

DESCRIPTION:
Check that the charm behaves correct regarding the ssh_key Juju secret.

    Note that this test does not attempt to utilize the SSH key as the passed key is not expected to be
    authorized anywhere.
NAME: test_ssh_key_secret

DESCRIPTION:
Check that the charm is active.

    Assume that the charm has already been built and is running.
NAME: test_active

DESCRIPTION: Test that setting static-assets-git-ref checks out the specified branch.
NAME: test_git_sync_ref

DESCRIPTION: Send an email via the reset password action of the MediaWiki API and verify mailpit received it.
NAME: test_send_email_via_api

DESCRIPTION: Check that the rotate-mediawiki-secrets action works as expected.
NAME: test_rotate_mediawiki_secrets_action

DESCRIPTION: Prepare the S3 bucket and integrate the S3 integrator with MediaWiki.
NAME: test_integrate_s3_integrator_with_mediawiki

DESCRIPTION: Check that the force-reconciliation action works on the leader and on all units.
NAME: test_force_reconciliation_action

DESCRIPTION: Test that Apache blocks HTTP access to dot files under /static.
NAME: test_git_sync_dotfiles_blocked

DESCRIPTION: Check that the charm is the expected version.
NAME: test_workload_version_is_set

DESCRIPTION: Test that removing the SMTP relation returns the charm to active.
NAME: test_smtp_relation_removal

DESCRIPTION: Test that the charm can integrate with an OAuth provider and enter an active state.
NAME: test_oauth_integration

DESCRIPTION:
Test that removing Redis while SAML is integrated causes blocked status.

    arrange: MediaWiki is deployed with SAML and Redis integrated.
    act: Remove the Redis relation.
    assert: The charm enters blocked status. Re-adding Redis restores active.
NAME: test_saml_requires_redis

DESCRIPTION: Test that static-assets-git-sparse-checkout limits which files are checked out.
NAME: test_git_sync_sparse_checkout

DESCRIPTION: Test that git-sync clones a repository over SSH and assets are available.
NAME: test_git_sync_ssh

DESCRIPTION: Check that the create-and-promote action works as expected.
NAME: test_create_and_promote_action

DESCRIPTION:
Test that removing the SAML integration returns MediaWiki to active.

    arrange: MediaWiki is deployed with SAML integrated.
    act: Remove the saml-integrator relation.
    assert: MediaWiki returns to active status without SAML.
NAME: test_saml_removal

DESCRIPTION: Check that the charm behaves correctly when certain relations are removed.
NAME: test_relations

DESCRIPTION:
Check that the charm can have extensions added after deployment.

    Add extensions by editing the composer config, and then running a database update.
NAME: test_add_extensions
